ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "opening" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "closing" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_closing" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend of the stock on the given date */,
  "split" REAL /* Split of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the stock */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sentiments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_change" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "prev_opening" REAL /* Previous opening price of the stock */,
  "prev_closing" REAL /* Previous closing price of the stock */,
  "prev_high" REAL /* Previous highest price of the stock */,
  "prev_low" REAL /* Previous lowest price of the stock */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change of the stock */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percent change of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_change_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_volume" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the volume record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "average_volume" INTEGER /* Average trading volume of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_volume_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_high_low" (
  "high_low_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each high and low record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the high and low record */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "year_high" REAL /* Yearly highest price of the stock */,
  "year_low" REAL /* Yearly lowest price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("high_low_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_high_low_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
